overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City at dusk. The player character navigates futuristic sidewalks, crosses an intersection with colorful crosswalk markings, and continues through a neon-lit commercial district with elevated highways and towering corporate architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure, approaching a large intersection

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated sign displaying '2' and Japanese characters in green neon
tall corporate tower with distinctive X-shaped structural bracing visible on facade
massive concrete and steel overpass with multiple lanes running above street level
vertical digital display showing fluctuating numerical values in blue and orange

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at dusk, with the camera walking forward beneath an elevated highway. A distinctive X-braced skyscraper dominates the center horizon, while neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the left side. Sparse pedestrians walk along the concrete path as futuristic vehicles pass on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with colorful crosswalk markings

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto a brightly colored crosswalk with red and blue geometric patterns
completes crossing and turns left onto the perpendicular street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection on the colorful crosswalk, then turning left to proceed down the new street

notable_agents.action: futuristic teal-colored car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: pavement marked with bold red and blue geometric patterns designating pedestrian crossing zone
massive dark structure with illuminated signage reading 'GUTS' on the facade
futuristic traffic signal with glowing blue and red indicators

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide open intersection as the camera crosses the colorful geometric crosswalk. The X-braced skyscraper shifts to the left as the camera turns. A large dark industrial building with 'GUTS' signage comes into view on the right. Futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection while pedestrians cross alongside the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with elevated highway and palm trees

events.description: passes directly beneath the elevated highway overpass, entering a more enclosed corridor
exits the overpass shadow into a narrower commercial street lined with palm trees and storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking down the commercial street, passing under the elevated highway and continuing past various storefronts and palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk, silhouetted against the dusk sky
large red illuminated billboard displaying 'CIRUS' in bold white letters
row of commercial shops with illuminated signs including 'OPEN' in Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down the new street, passing under the shadow of the elevated highway overpass before emerging into a narrower commercial corridor. Palm trees line the sidewalk, and neon signs including a prominent red 'CIRUS' billboard illuminate the path. The large industrial building recedes into the distance on the right as the camera passes various storefronts with glowing signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic cityscape at dusk, moving from a wide industrial thoroughfare into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, where the camera advances toward a dominant X-braced skyscraper flanked by glowing digital billboards and passing vehicles. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the perspective shifts while crossing a colorful geometric crosswalk, bringing a large industrial building with GUTS signage into view on the right. The scene then transitions back under the shadow of the highway overpass before emerging into a narrower street lined with palm trees. Finally, the camera glides past glowing storefronts and a prominent red CIRUS billboard as the industrial architecture recedes into the distance.
